meta.title: Counterbalance Ep. 13 | Rich Outzen on The Return of Geopolitics
meta.description:
Rich Outzen, career military officer and senior State Department advisor on the Middle East, sat down with Mike and Marshall to discuss the challenge that geopolitics in a multipolar world poses for the United States.

Apple Podcasts: https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/counterbalance/id1553960915
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/4j9FejEcp2NFsawahn9OfM
